item.title:

item.title: AroundTheNFL: Around The NFL @AroundTheNFL · 34min Bengals HC Zac Taylor on adding DT Dexter Lawrence: "We are excited to add Dexter t
item.description:
Around The NFL @AroundTheNFL · 34min Bengals HC Zac Taylor on adding DT Dexter Lawrence: "We are excited to add Dexter to our team. He has been a dominant player in the league since he was drafted, and he will be a tremendous presence on the field and in our locker room."
https:// nfl.com/news/nfl-netwo rk-giants-trading-dt-dexter-lawrence-to-bengals-in-exchange-for-2026-no-10-overall-pick?campaign=Twitter_atn … 1 1 14 7 mil
